ane_embedder.runtime: CoreML (ANE primary) → MLX ModernBERT fallback → hash fallback
issues: model_name='minilm_ane' parameter misleading — actual file is AllMiniLML6V2.mlmodelc

vision_encoder.uses_ane: attempts to (compute_units=ALL), but model_path=None by default
vision_encoder.production_path: partial — wired but no bundled model
issues: model_path=None by default → always dummy mode in production
VisionOCR already handles document encoding (canonical path)
VisionEncoder may be dead code on the document path
vision_encoder.recommendation: Audit call sites in multimodal/analyzer.py — confirm dummy mode vs broken integration. Either wire a real model or remove from call path.

vision_captcha_solver.uses_ane: only if model_path provided and use_ane=True
issues: No production call site found — CAPTCHA solving goes through 2captcha API
VNCoreMLModel.modelForMLModel() path is experimental and untested
vision_captcha_solver.recommendation: Audit call site absence. Gate CoreML path behind feature flag or remove dead code if never called in production.

vision_ocr.runtime: Apple Vision via ocrmac (ANE-assisted on M1)
vision_ocr.recommendation: Keep as-is. Canonical OCR path, Apple-native, production-wired.

ner_ane_path.runtime: PyTorch GLiNER (production) + NaturalLanguage NLTagger ANE (untested) + CoreML ner.mlmodel (untested)
issues: _nl_process_sync() uses NLTagger which DOES use ANE — real path but unverified quality
_load_coreml_model() looks for ner.mlmodel — never called in observed production
_ane_predictions counter never incremented — path not exercised in production
ner.mlmodel does not ship with the project
ner_ane_path.recommendation: Keep PyTorch GLiNER as production path. Add quality benchmark: NLTagger vs GLiNER entity F1 on held-out set before activating ANE path.

issues: Heavy model — OOM risk on M1 8GB when loaded concurrently with Hermes
Memory guard at 5GB RSS skip — correct but not solving the problem
Should be replaced with SmolVLM2-500M-4bit (M1-safe) per MODEL_INTEGRATION_PLAN
vlm_analyzer.recommendation: Replace *(removed — M1 8GB unsafe)* with mlx-community/SmolVLM2-500M-4bit after benchmark confirms quality parity.

vision_ocr_vs_vision_encoder.verdict: VisionOCR is correct canonical path. VisionEncoder provides no value in dummy mode.
vision_ocr_vs_vision_encoder.action: Audit VisionEncoder call sites, wire real model or remove

ner_gliner_vs_ner_ane.verdict: GLiNER is correct production path. ANE path exists but entity quality is unverified.
ner_gliner_vs_ner_ane.action: Benchmark NLTagger vs GLiNER F1 before activating ANE path

captcha_2captcha_vs_coreml.stub: VNCoreMLModel + YOLO CoreML (experimental, no production call site)
captcha_2captcha_vs_coreml.verdict: 2captcha is the real path. CoreML YOLO path has no production call site.
captcha_2captcha_vs_coreml.action: Gate CoreML path behind HLEDAC_ENABLE_CAPTCHA_COREML or remove

change_later_no_implementation_yet.change: Fix misleading model_name='minilm_ane' → document actual AllMiniLML6V2.mlmodelc path
Either wire real model or remove from multimodal/analyzer.py call path
change_later_no_implementation_yet.trigger: After call site audit confirms dummy-only

change_later_no_implementation_yet.change: Add NLTagger vs GLiNER F1 benchmark before activating ANE path
change_later_no_implementation_yet.trigger: Before any ANE NER production use

change_later_no_implementation_yet.change: Gate CoreML YOLO path behind feature flag or remove dead code
change_later_no_implementation_yet.trigger: After call site audit confirms no production usage
